description: Real-world school digest with Valentine's Day party photos (past) and newsletter with future author visit

input_summary.subject: Feb 12, 2026 Digest: 2 new messages from Walnut Heights School today

events.title: Double Author Visit
events.location: Walnut Heights School, 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Author visit at school with book signing. Books can be pre-ordered through Rakestraw Bookstore.

events.title: No School - Presidents Day
events.description: School is closed from February 12th to 16th for the Presidents Day long weekend.

events.title: Double Author Visit
events.location: Walnut Heights Elementary School, 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Two authors will visit the school on March 12th. Students can order books through Rakestraw Bookstore to have them signed by the authors on the day of the visit. Books will be delivered to the school.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase (TK and K only)
events.location: MPR at Walnut Heights Elementary School
events.description: Join us at Walnut Heights in the MPR to see what TK and Kindergarten students have been working on in Music class with Mrs Gold. A livestream link will be sent out a few days before the event for those who cannot attend in person. Contact Mrs Gold at jcousins@walnutcreeksd.org for questions.

CalendarEvent.description: A single calendar event extracted from an email.

start_datetime.description: The event start date and time (ISO 8601)
start_datetime.title: Start Datetime

end_datetime.description: The event end date and time (ISO 8601)
end_datetime.title: End Datetime

all_day.description: Whether this is an all-day event
all_day.title: All Day

description.description: Detailed description of the event with all relevant information
description.title: Description

confidence.description: Confidence score from 0.0 to 1.0 indicating extraction certainty
confidence.title: Confidence

importance.description: Event importance: 'action_required' for closures, schedule changes, deadlines the user must act on; 'fyi' for themed days, birthdays, informational items that are nice to know
importance.title: Importance

CalendarEvent.title: CalendarEvent

events_found.description: Whether any calendar events were found in the email
events_found.title: Events Found
